PARTICIPATION

HOOT is building the infrastructure for a participant-first digital economy—powering the future of interactive streaming for creators and communities worldwide. Currently scaling in India and beyond.

Discover the Vision

ABOUT US

WHAT WE DO

HOOT is a live entertainment platform redefining how creators and communities connect. We are building a participation-driven ecosystem designed to power the future of interactive streaming.

We focus on long-form, high-engagement live experiences where communities are not just viewers but active participants. HOOT is designed to transform real-time attention into meaningful opportunity while empowering creators with sustainable, scalable monetization models.

VISION

We envision a future where live entertainment evolves into a participation-powered digital economy.

Where every viewer has influence, every creator has independence, and engagement becomes real value. HOOT exists to build the infrastructure that enables that future.

OUR MISSION

Our mission is to create a scalable, creator-first live streaming platform that transforms passive audiences into active communities.

  • Empowering creators with fair and sustainable monetization
  • Enabling meaningful real-time engagement
  • Building brand-safe, high-attention live environments with AI-assisted moderation
  • Expanding access to opportunity through digital participation

THE TEAM

Gulam Muhammed

Founder & CEO

Leading HOOT's vision to build India's creator-first streaming platform and transform how gaming creators monetize and engage with their communities across Kerala and South India.

Sharath B (BLIND Joker)

Director

Co-founder of BLIND Esports, South India's largest esports organization based in Kerala. Under his leadership, BLIND Esports won BMPS 2023 (India's biggest esports tournament), launched the BLIND Elevate creator support program, and generates over 150 million monthly impressions. Directing HOOT's strategic growth and creator partnerships to build a sustainable creator economy across South India.

Dilin Dinesan (Eagle Gaming)

Advisory Partner

One of Kerala's most recognized gaming creators with 844K+ YouTube subscribers. Known for his GTA V roleplay character "Parunth Vasu" and aggressive gameplay style that resonates deeply with Kerala's gaming community. Advising on creator experience and platform features to ensure HOOT serves gaming communities effectively.

Muhammed Ramees (Kaztro Gaming)

Advisory Partner

Kerala's largest gaming creator with 1.2M+ YouTube subscribers and official Battlegrounds Mobile India partner. Bringing strategic insights on creator engagement, audience building, and platform growth to help HOOT scale across South India's diverse gaming landscape.

Athul Sherif (BLIND Rebel)

Advisory Partner

Popular GTA V streamer and BLIND Esports affiliate with 45M+ Loco Gold earned through engaging content and strategic collaborations. Known for informative gameplay and strong community connections with Eagle Gaming. Providing guidance on creator needs, audience engagement strategies, and platform development.
